message:
Fix gt handoff from hq-boot session

sessionWorkDir only matched hq-deacon by exact name comparison, but
hq-boot (boot watchdog) parses as RoleDeacon and fell through to the
unhandled default case. Add mayor/deacon/overseer to the inner role
switch so all hq- session variants resolve correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
